content:
**Pushed:** `d4cb16c1` — `chore(#3423): update homepage welcome text for verification run`

The homepage `<h1>` in `src/app/(frontend)/page.tsx` now displays "Welcome from kody — verify run 1778767125014" instead of "Welcome to your new project." The PR #3424 draft will update and Vercel will redeploy the preview.
